config.installCommand: if [ -f pyproject.toml ]; then mv pyproject.toml pyproject.toml.vc_temp || true; fi && if [ -f requirements.txt ]; then mv requirements.txt requirements.txt.vc_temp || true; fi && python -m pip install --upgrade pip && echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: wheelhouse check' && if [ -d wheelhouse ] && [ "$(ls -A wheelhouse)" ]; then echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: installing from wheelhouse' && python -m pip install --no-index --find-links wheelhouse -r requirements.base.txt -t _vendor --no-cache-dir -v || (echo 'wheelhouse install failed' && exit 1) && python -m pip install --no-index --find-links wheelhouse -t _vendor SQLAlchemy==1.4.46 greenlet==3.2.4 --no-cache-dir -v || (echo 'wheel install failed' && exit 1); else echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: vendoring from PyPI' && python -m pip install -r requirements.base.txt --no-cache-dir --prefer-binary -v && python -m pip install -t _vendor -r requirements.base.txt --no-cache-dir --prefer-binary -v && python -m pip install -t _vendor Jinja2 PyJWT SQLAlchemy==1.4.46 greenlet==3.2.4 --no-cache-dir --prefer-binary -v || (echo 'force-install failed' && exit 1); fi && echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: pip freeze (system)' && python -m pip freeze && echo '== VERCEL INSTALL: ls _vendor (top entries)' && (ls -1 _vendor | head -n 200 || true) && if [ -f requirements.txt.vc_temp ]; then mv requirements.txt.vc_temp requirements.txt || true; fi && if [ -f pyproject.toml.vc_temp ]; then mv pyproject.toml.vc_temp pyproject.toml || true; fi
